# Workflow: Content Production

## Trigger
New content idea

## Objective
Publish optimized content

## Inputs
- Topic
- Keywords

## Outputs
- Published content

## Steps
1. Research keywords
2. Create outline
3. Draft content
4. Optimize SEO
5. Add visuals
6. Review/edit
7. Publish
8. Distribute

## Deliverables
- Live content
